label: Current Shelf
description: Baseline: reflects the store's existing assortment and placement as-is, no optimization applied.

label: Optimized Shelf
description: Default balanced optimization using the current Metric Center weights.

label: Premium Strategy
description: Weights shifted toward margin, premium tier, and price point strength; favors elevated/premium SKUs for eye-level placement.

label: Growth Strategy
description: Weights shifted toward growth rate and trend metrics; favors SKUs with strong momentum even at lower current volume.

label: Margin Strategy
description: Weights maximized toward margin dollars and margin percent, deprioritizing raw volume.
